calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Judgment Entered

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 04:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rod Divelbiss, Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Clear Task Inc.
Sridhar Radhakrishnan, Consultant/Programmer Analyst for Respondent/Plaintiff Probys, Inc.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Sridhar Radhakrishnan is sworn.

Sridhar Radhakrishnan testifies on behalf of Probys, Inc, Respondent/Plaintiff. The following documentary evidences are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Work Order
Exhibit 2 - Approved Timesheets
Exhibit 3 - Master Agreement
Exhibit 4 - Email Correspondence
Exhibit 5 - Employment Letter
Exhibit 6 - Paystub

Rod Divelbiss, counsel for Appellant/Defendant, examines Mr. Radhakrishnan. The following documentary evidences are introduced:
Exhibit A - Sridar Radhakrishnan Linked In Profile
Exhibit B - Probys Consulting Agreement
Exhibit C - Consultant Consent
Exhibit D - Probys Invoice
Exhibit E - Email Confirming Settlement 12/30/11

Respondent/Plaintiff is ordered to discuss the settlement offer by Appellant/Defendant with the Probys CEO. Outcome of the settlement discussion shall be communicated to the court clerk via email by 4:30pm of today's date.

If there is no resolution, Appellant/Defendant is ordered to submit the law on the corporation licensed to do business in California and if the corporation's license is suspended, whether the suspended corporation can come in to the Court to proceed litigation, by 4:30pm on Monday, June 11, 2012 via email to the court clerk. Respondent's/Plaintiff's response shall be submitted by 4:30pm on Friday, June 15, 2012.

Judge Ellen Chaitin, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported (505).
